meaning: n.豬ｷ蠎慕函迚ｩ,豬ｷ蠎慕噪蜉ｨ讀咲黄鄒､
examples: The fish feed on benthos, larva of aquatic insect and other fishes.
The benthos -- the animals living on and in the sediments -- populate this vast ecosystem.
In 1986 and 1988 the authors sampled macrofauna benthos and investigated the distribution of biomass and density.
